input.currentText: [fixture] In Pittsburgh in 2020, the city council increased library funding 12% and saw measurable literacy gains within 24 months. The Detroit proposal under discussion is structurally analogous; the same path should apply here.
input.parentText: [fixture] Should Detroit increase library funding by 12%?
input.threadContextExcerpt: [fixture] Debate room: Detroit library funding proposal. Move uses Pittsburgh as governing precedent.
